form.formComment: Resuming after a 11 months break. Not seen since he finished last of 10 at this track May 17 over 302m, 5 len behind Flyin Cowgirl 123 carrying 56kg at $12.80. On debut third of 7 at this track March 8 2025 over 274m, 0.9 len behind Rare Breed carrying 57kg at $6.90. Prefer others.
